creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Jarrod,

Jarrod Sayers, 16.10.08, 13:21h CEST:

> The Nagios Plugins PR has been raised, ports/128144.  Once completed, i'll 
> provide a slightly modified patch for this PR.

any news on this? Please note that your update to net-mgmt/nagios-plugins
has been committed.

Regards,
Stefan
